hero.subtitle: Attorney-led AI regulatory monitoring — source-verified, structured for legal practice.

home.aboutBody: Building a structured, source-backed legal intelligence layer for AI regulation across Europe and the United States — source-verified at every step.

capabilities.title: Regulatory monitoring
capabilities.desc: Live tracking of EU AI Act obligations and 50-state U.S. AI legislation.

capabilities.title: Source verification
capabilities.desc: Only officially verified or multi-source-corroborated items are published.

capabilities.title: Structured intelligence
capabilities.desc: Jurisdiction-level profiles with binding status, legal area, and development type.

home.postureBody: Every published item is traceable to an official source or corroborated across serious sources before going live. No algorithmic summaries.
home.footerTagline: C. Saint-Girons, Esq — AI Law & Legal Intelligence
